hooks.command: jq -r --arg msg 'Java gate applies (.claude/rules/java.md): no comments, tests mandatory, review gate before commit.' 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "" | endswith(".java")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$msg}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r --arg msg 'Before committing .java changes: run affected tests + code-review gate (.claude/rules/java.md).' 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // "") | endswith(".java")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$msg}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
